india_trends.title: Goldline Pharmaceutical IPO opens today: Check GMP, subscription status, and other details
india_trends.summary: Goldline Pharmaceutical's IPO opened on May 12, aiming to raise ₹11.61 crore with shares priced between ₹41-43. The grey market premium suggests a debut price of ₹60. Funds will reduce debt and cover corporate expenses. Allotment results expected by May 15.

india_trends.title: On first PM visit to Norway in 4 decades, Modi and hosts to discuss long-term LPG deal
india_trends.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will visit Norway next week, marking the first trip by an Indian PM to Oslo in 43 years. Talks are expected to focus on long-term energy partnerships, maritime cooperation, climate action, and sustainable development.

india_trends.title: Ambani’s Cola war with Coke, Pepsi spurs fridge bonanza in India
india_trends.summary: India’s cola war between Reliance’s Campa Cola, Coca-Cola and PepsiCo is unexpectedly boosting sales of commercial refrigerators, as beverage giants aggressively install coolers across small retail stores to expand market share.
